title: MLS client fallback creates wrong-identity group client on double-init failure
description: event.rs line 113: On reconnect, if MlsClient::new(&state.my_pub_id) fails, the fallback initializes a client with pub_id='fallback' instead of the actual user's pub_id. This corrupts the MLS group identity. The code assumes mls_active will stay false, but if the admin reconnects and enters DirectoryList again, it will try to create_group() with the wrong identity, causing silent encryption state corruption. Fallback should either panic (fail hard) or not reset the client—escalate to core team for intent.
